title: veridict input record
description: One JSONL line (or CSV row) of input to `veridict compare`/`sprt`/`matrix`'s legacy per-file mode. Every field is optional at the schema level - which combination is actually usable depends on which metric is being computed (see README's Input format section) - but at least one of result/baseline+candidate/baseline_status/candidate_status must be present or the record is rejected as a schema mismatch.

id.description: Used by --paired-by-id to net two records sharing an id into one observation.
